item.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.
The procedures listed below are for the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Install the front airbag sensor with the bolt.

item.ptxt: If the front airbag sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case, bracket or connector, replace it with a new one.
When installing the front airbag sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

s2.ptxt: Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the front airbag sensor.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

s2.ptxt: Inspect the SRS warning light (See page ).
